Description: A unique identifier for each food order.
The date and time when the customer placed the order.
Cleaning/Analysis Importance: Essential for Time-Series analysis and calculating delivery speed.

Description: The date and time when the food was delivered to the customer.
Cleaning/Analysis Importance: Used with order_time to find delivery duration. Will be null for non-online orders.

Description: The name of the restaurant where the order was placed.
Cleaning/Analysis Importance: Primary key for Performance analysis (Top restaurants).

Description: The category of food (e.g., Italian, Biryani, Chinese).
Cleaning/Analysis Importance: Used to identify popular food trends in Bengaluru.

Description: The total cost of the order in INR (₹).
Cleaning/Analysis Importance: Key metric for Revenue analysis and finding Average Order Value (AOV).

Description: Customer rating provided for the order (e.g., "4.5/5", "NEW").
Cleaning/Analysis Importance: Requires String splitting and casting to Float for mathematical analysis.

Description: The specific area in Bengaluru (e.g., Koramangala, HSR Layout).
Cleaning/Analysis Importance: Used for Geospatial analysis to see which areas are busiest.
Often contains typos (e.g., Bnegaluru) that require standardization.

Description: The number of items included in a single order.
Cleaning/Analysis Importance: Helps calculate Price per unit and volume of food sold.

Description: Indicates if the customer booked a table (Yes/No).
Cleaning/Analysis Importance: Categorical feature to compare Dining vs. Delivery spending.

Description: Indicates if the order was placed via an app/website (Yes/No).
Cleaning/Analysis Importance: Critical for conditional cleaning of delivery and distance columns.

Description: The distance between the restaurant and the delivery point.
Cleaning/Analysis Importance: Used to analyze logistics efficiency and delivery speed.
